column1: # LDBC SNB Interactive v1 pre-generated artifacts — pinned manifest.
# Single source of truth for both fetch-dataset.sh and fetch-dataset.ps1.
#   scale     scale factor the artifact belongs to (0.1 | 1)
#   filename  basename written into the cache directory
#   sha256    SHA-256 of the compressed archive, captured 2026-07-19
#   bytes     Content-Length as served on 2026-07-19 (progress + early mismatch)
# The checksums below were computed locally from the downloaded archives, not
# copied from upstream (LDBC publishes no checksum file for Interactive v1).
# Re-pinning is a deliberate act: download, verify the contents are what you
# expect, then update the sha256 here in the same commit.
# Serializer choice: CsvCompositeMergeForeign — the composite-merged layout,
# 18 CSV files total, the fewest of the CSV serializers. LongDateFormatter
# emits dates as epoch milliseconds, which the loader coerces explicitly.
